title: Tweezer Rescue
description: A fine-motor sorting game where kids pinch-drag pom-poms into color and size nests.
learningGoals: Practice pincer-grip control through short drag motions
Match pom-poms by color and spoken size
Build gentle precision with retry-friendly placement
interactionModel: sort-into-bins drag or tap-tap pom-poms into nests
feedbackModel: Correct sorts get pop and sparkle SFX plus spoken praise; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry.

modes.title: Color Nests
modes.skill: pincer-grip drag control and color matching

modes.title: Big and Small
modes.skill: pincer-grip drag control and size vocabulary

credits: Kaigani; emoji and swatch placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
